professional_profile.core_values: - **Clarity over complexity** – I turn complex issues simple and keep specs clear - **Reliability and correctness** – Care deeply about system robustness, idempotency, failure handling, and observability - **Ownership and responsibility** – I take end-to-end responsibility for what I build and lead with deep system understanding - **Automation for quality** – Improve quality and speed through thoughtful automation - **Focus and depth** – I do my best work when I can concentrate and avoid constant context switching - **Honest communication** – I value transparency, realistic expectations, and early alignment - **Sustainable pace** – Long-term effectiveness matters more than short-term heroics
professional_profile.engineering_capabilities: - Backend system design and distributed systems architecture - API design, versioning, and contracts - Event-driven and message-based architectures - Feature flags and gradual rollout strategies at enterprise scale - DevOps automation and CI/CD tooling - Performance optimization for high-read systems - Trade-off analysis and edge case thinking
professional_profile.technologies: - Expert: C#, .NET 8, ASP.NET, GitHub Actions, LaunchDarkly - Proficient: TypeScript, Kubernetes, Terraform, Azure, RabbitMQ, MongoDB - Familiar: Ansible, Dynatrace

working_style.problem_solving: - I approach design questions by first **clarifying assumptions and constraints** - I prefer to start with a **clear, minimal happy path** and then expand to edge cases - I focus on **why decisions are made**, not just what the components are - I am comfortable saying **"this is a trade-off"** rather than pretending there is a perfect solution - I **lead with ownership** — dive deep into systems and create clear documentation for others
working_style.collaboration: - **Calm, thoughtful, and analytical** - Prefer **async communication** and written clarity when possible - Comfortable **working independently**, but value alignment and trust with teammates - I perform best with **clear expectations** rather than constant pressure - Experience **collaborating with external vendors** (LaunchDarkly) and internal stakeholders - Strong at **organizing team workflows** and DevOps processes

professional_profile.looking_for: - **Backend / platform roles** with real ownership and architectural impact - Opportunities to **lead technical initiatives** (like the LaunchDarkly integration) - Teams that value **thinking, not just speed** - Problems that involve **system design, reliability, automation, and scale** - A culture that **respects human limits** and long-term growth - Environments where **DevOps and development collaborate closely** - **Roles with a single primary focus area**, not "wear many hats" environments that require constant parallel context-switching
professional_profile.how_to_collaborate_with_me: - **Clear problem statements and priorities** - **Space to think** before executing - **Trust over micromanagement** - **Alignment on expectations** rather than pressure - Opportunities to **take ownership** and dive deep into systems
professional_profile.dealbreakers: - Work arrangement must be Hybrid (not Remote-only, not Onsite-only) - No "wear many hats" or multi-domain context switching roles - No hero culture or "fast-paced" without sustainability context
